label: 1556 CE
era_summary: Year 1556 (MDLVI) was a leap year starting on Wednesday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1556: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
